English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Human services workshop records
House, Ronald B.
23-5-2873
1 cubic feet. 1 cubic feet.
1968-1993. Manuals Human services, management, and personnel workshop records for programs held in Cornell's School of Industrial and Labor Relations and the New York State College of Human Ecology; workshops were in part sponsored by the United States Dept. of Education Rehabilitation Services Administration. Collection material in English 2886811
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Eileen Keating
Date completed:
April 2, 2004
EAD encoding:
Carolyn Smith, March 2004
Date modified:
RMC staff, March 2015
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Human services, management, and personnel workshop records for programs held in Cornell's School of Industrial and Labor Relations and the New York State College of Human Ecology; workshops were in part sponsored by the United States Dept. of Education Rehabilitation Services Administration.
Cite As:
Human services workshop records, #23-5-2873. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Personnel management. Management -- Study and teaching. Human services. New York State School of Industrial and Labor Relations New York State College of Human Ecology United States. Department of Education. Rehabilitation Services Administration
